cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write verbose harvest and respawn diagnostics to the BepInEx console. Leave off for normal play.
cfg.include_garden_berry_bushes.name: Include Garden Berry Bushes
cfg.include_garden_berry_bushes.desc: Apply the mod's respawn and harvest fixes to berry bushes you've planted in your garden.
cfg.include_garden_trees.name: Include Garden Trees
cfg.include_garden_trees.desc: Apply the mod's respawn and harvest fixes to fruit trees you've planted in your garden.
cfg.include_garden_bee_hives.name: Include Garden Bee Hives
cfg.include_garden_bee_hives.desc: Apply the mod's respawn and harvest fixes to bee hives you've placed in your garden.
cfg.realistic_harvest.name: Realistic Harvest
cfg.realistic_harvest.desc: Randomise the harvest amount and drop timing slightly so yields don't feel mechanical.
cfg.show_harvest_ready_messages.name: Show Harvest Ready Messages
cfg.show_harvest_ready_messages.desc: Show a small floating message when trees, bushes, or hives are ready to harvest.
cfg.include_world_berry_bushes.name: Include World Berry Bushes
cfg.include_world_berry_bushes.desc: Apply the mod's fixes to wild berry bushes out in the world, not just garden-planted ones. Not recommended without Where's Ma' Storage.
cfg.bee_keeper_buyback.name: Bee Keeper Buyback
cfg.bee_keeper_buyback.desc: Let the beekeeper buy bees back from you, so surplus hives are worth selling.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
